# Project Overview

This is the main overview of the project. It contains enough text to be meaningful and pass the minimum chunk size threshold for testing purposes. The project aims to solve document retrieval problems for AI agents by providing structured chunking.

## Architecture

The architecture section describes how the system is built. It provides details about components, their interactions, and design decisions made during development. The system uses a pipeline architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Data Flow

Data flows through the system in a well-defined pipeline. Events are processed sequentially and stored in the database for later retrieval by the query engine. Each stage validates its inputs and outputs to ensure data integrity throughout the process.

## Installation

To install the project, clone the repository and run the setup script. Make sure you have Node.js installed and all dependencies resolved before starting. Configuration is handled through environment variables and a local config file.
